# Treebark

> Safe HTML tree structures for Markdown and content-driven apps.

Treebark is a lightweight specification and library for expressing safe HTML structures as JSON or YAML tree schemas. It is designed to embed structured markup inside Markdown fenced code blocks without raw HTML, preventing XSS while enabling rich layouts. The spec and implementations are fully open source.

## Links

- [Home](https://treebark.js.org/): Overview and live playground
- [Specification](https://treebark.js.org/spec): Full language and schema specification
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/danmarshall/treebark): Source code, issues, and contributions
- [npm: treebark](https://www.npmjs.com/package/treebark): Core JavaScript/TypeScript library
- [npm: markdown-it-treebark](https://www.npmjs.com/package/markdown-it-treebark): markdown-it plugin for rendering Treebark code blocks

## Optional

- [Playground](https://treebark.js.org/playground): Interactive browser-based editor
- [Development Guide](https://github.com/danmarshall/treebark/blob/main/DEVELOPMENT.md): How to build and contribute
